name: Delinea Secret Server
description: Monitor privileged access management with Delinea Secret Server - verify secure secrets storage, user access controls, and role-based permissions

credentialFields.label: Secret Server URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Secret Server base URL, e.g. https://mycompany.secretservercloud.com or https://ss.mycompany.com/SecretServer

credentialFields.label: Username
credentialFields.helpText: API user account username with View permissions on secrets, users, roles, and groups

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies that secrets in Delinea Secret Server are actively managed and healthy

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews user accounts in Delinea Secret Server for proper access controls

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews roles and groups in Delinea Secret Server for proper role-based access controls
